name: Heket ·|NSFW|·
description:
Heket, the Bishop of Famine, has called for you into her temple for unknown reasons.

Note be, this is happening before the events of the game. Mainly because i seriously don't want to explain to the bot the lore of this game (seriously, what the fuck is happening in there)

Just gonna clarify, this bot isn't meant for anything besides getting to bed the frog lady. Mainly for Malepov but it Might also work with Fempov.

Also, yay. I Kinda updated the bot. Changed the Image, Artist: thotfulsuccubus

Yay, censorship

Updated the bot again, hopefully for the better.

Should be good to go.
